```{r comparisons_4_2_F_Tasso_WB_v_Tasso_WB_Shipped}

## Comparison 4_2_F: Individual testing using ggstatplots with cell filter applied to phenotyping outputs

## Phenotyping Frequency ggstatplots

dir.plots_analysis <- file.path(dir.plots,"Comparison_4_2_F_Tasso_WB_v_Tasso_WB_Shipped")
dir.create(dir.plots_analysis)

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%  filter(Donor %in% filtered_tasso_id) %>%
  filter(Group == "Tasso WB" | Group == "Tasso WB Shipped")

### Filter out low cell count sets

sets_to_remove <- unique(data_phen_all_selected[data_phen_all_selected$Filter == TRUE,]$Donor_Population_Date)

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
  filter(Donor_Population_Date %notin% sets_to_remove)

### Filter out low cell count sets

table(data_phen_all_selected$Donor, data_phen_all_selected$Group)
table(data_phen_all_selected$Population, data_phen_all_selected$Group)

plot_cols_names <- c(plot_phen_cols_names, "Count")

for (i in unique(data_phen_all_selected$Population)){
  print(i)
  
  data.plot <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
    filter(Population == i)
  
  current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sum_rm_na) == 0]] #removes columns where the selected samples have no values for a parameter
  
    current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sd) == 0]] #removes columns where there is no differences, fucks up ggstatplot otherwise
  
  # plotlist <- purrr::pmap(
  #   .l = list(
  #     data = list(data.plot),
  #     x = "Group",
  #     y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
  #     title = as.list(paste("Parameter: ", current_plot_cols_names, "      Population: ", i,  " Filtered",sep="")),
  #     type = "nonparametric",
  #     plot.type = "box",
  #     pairwise.display = "none",
  #     package = "ggsci",
  #     palette = "default_igv",
  #     silent = TRUE,
  #     point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
  #     centrality.point.args = list(list(alpha = 0)),
  #     violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
  #     ggplot.component = list(list(
  #     geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 5, alpha = 0.8, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
  #     ylim(0,NA)
  #     )
  #   )),
  #   .f = ggwithinstats
  # )
  
  plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = as.list(paste("Parameter: ", current_plot_cols_names, "      Population: ", i,  " Filtered", sep="")),
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      package = "ggsci",
      palette = "default_igv",
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.point.args = list(list(alpha = 0)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 5, alpha = 0.8, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      ylim(0,NA)
      )
    )),
    .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
  # names(plotlist) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats) <- current_plot_cols_names
  
  stat_list <- lapply(plotlist_with_stats, extract_stats)
  
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep="")))
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "stat_tables"))
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"))
  
for (x in names(stat_list)){
  # print(x)
  temp <- stat_list[[x]]$subtitle_data
  write_csv(temp,
            file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis,
                             paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),
                             "stat_tables",
                             paste(i, " ", x, ".csv", sep = ""))
  )
}
  
  # lapply(names(plotlist),
  #        function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "Filtered.pdf", 
  #                                           sep=""),
  #                          path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
  #                          height = 8,
  #                          width = 12, 
  #                          plot = plotlist[[x]]))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_Filtered.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 8,
                           width = 12,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats[[x]]))
}

write.csv(data_phen_all_selected,
          file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, "data_phen_all_selected.csv"))

```

```{r For_Puplication_comparisons_3_2_Vein_WB_v_Tasso_WB}

## Publication Comparison 3_2: Individual testing using ggstatplots

## Population Frequency ggstatplots

dir.plots_analysis <- file.path(dir.plots,"Puplication_Comparison_3_2_Vein_WB_v_Tasso_WB")
dir.create(dir.plots_analysis)

data_frequency_all_selected <- data_frequency_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group == "Vein WB" | Group == "Tasso WB")

table(data_frequency_all_selected$Donor, data_frequency_all_selected$Group)
table(data_frequency_all_selected$Donor, data_frequency_all_selected$Group)

data.plot <- data_frequency_all_selected

current_plot_cols_names <- plot_freq_all_cols_names
  
plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
  .l = list(
    data = list(data.plot),
    x = "Group",
    y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
    title = "Blank",
    type = "nonparametric",
    plot.type = "box",
    pairwise.display = "all",
    bf.message = FALSE,
    results.subtitle = FALSE,
    silent = TRUE,
    point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
    centrality.plotting = FALSE,
    centrality.path = FALSE,
    centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
    centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
    boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
    violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
    point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
    ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,100),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("Vein", "Tasso")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )

plotlist_with_stats_free_scale <- purrr::pmap(
  .l = list(
    data = list(data.plot),
    x = "Group",
    y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
    title = "Blank",
    type = "nonparametric",
    plot.type = "box",
    pairwise.display = "all",
    bf.message = FALSE,
    results.subtitle = FALSE,
    silent = TRUE,
    point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
    centrality.plotting = FALSE,
    centrality.path = FALSE,
    centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
    centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
    boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
    violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
    point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
    ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,NA),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("Vein", "Tasso")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )

names(plotlist_with_stats) <- current_plot_cols_names
names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale) <- current_plot_cols_names

plotlist_with_stats$T_cells_Total_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils <- plotlist_with_stats$T_cells_Total_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100), breaks = seq(0, 100, 25))

plotlist_with_stats$`Monocytes&Macrophages_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils` <- plotlist_with_stats$`Monocytes&Macrophages_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils` + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 50), breaks = seq(0, 50, 10))

plotlist_with_stats$B_cells_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils <- plotlist_with_stats$B_cells_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 50), breaks = seq(0, 50, 10))
plotlist_with_stats$NK_cell_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils <- plotlist_with_stats$NK_cell_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 50), breaks = seq(0, 50, 10))

plotlist_with_stats$cDCs_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils <- plotlist_with_stats$cDCs_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5), breaks = seq(0, 5, 1))
plotlist_with_stats$pDCs_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils <- plotlist_with_stats$pDCs_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5), breaks = seq(0, 5, 1))
plotlist_with_stats$Basophils_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils <- plotlist_with_stats$Basophils_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5), breaks = seq(0, 5, 1))

plotlist_with_stats$NK_cell_CD56bright_Percent_of_NK_cell_Total <- plotlist_with_stats$NK_cell_CD56bright_Percent_of_NK_cell_Total + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), breaks = seq(0, 20, 5))

plotlist_with_stats$cDCs_cDC1s_Percent_of_cDCs_Total <- plotlist_with_stats$cDCs_cDC1s_Percent_of_cDCs_Total + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 10), breaks = seq(0, 10, 2))

plotlist_with_stats$`Monocytes&Macrophages_Intermediate_Percent_of_Monocytes&Macrophages_Total` <- plotlist_with_stats$`Monocytes&Macrophages_Intermediate_Percent_of_Monocytes&Macrophages_Total` + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 25), breaks = seq(0, 25, 5))

plotlist_with_stats$`Monocytes&Macrophages_Nonclassical_Percent_of_Monocytes&Macrophages_Total` <- plotlist_with_stats$`Monocytes&Macrophages_Nonclassical_Percent_of_Monocytes&Macrophages_Total` + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 25), breaks = seq(0, 25, 5))


dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep="")))
dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"))

lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats),
       function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(x, "_with_stats_scaled.pdf", sep=""),
                         path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"),
                         height = 1.4,
                         width = 1,
                         plot = plotlist_with_stats[[x]]))

lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale),
       function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(x, "_with_stats_free_scale.pdf", sep=""),
                         path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"),
                         height = 1.4,
                         width = 1,
                         plot = plotlist_with_stats_free_scale[[x]]))


## Phenotyping Frequency ggstatplots

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group == "Vein WB" | Group == "Tasso WB")

table(data_phen_all_selected$Donor, data_phen_all_selected$Group)

plot_cols_names <- c(plot_phen_cols_names, "Count")

for (i in unique(data_phen_all_selected$Population)){
  print(i)
  
  data.plot <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
    filter(Population == i)
  
  current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sum_rm_na) == 0]] #removes columns where the selected samples have no values for a parameter
  
    current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sd) == 0]] #removes columns where there is no differences, fucks up ggstatplot otherwise
  

  
  plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,100),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("Vein", "Tasso")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
   plotlist_with_stats_free_scale <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,NA),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("Vein", "Tasso")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
  # names(plotlist) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale) <- current_plot_cols_names
  
  # stat_list <- lapply(plotlist_with_stats, extract_stats)
  
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep="")))
  # dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"stat_tables"))
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"plots"))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats[[x]]))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_free_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats_free_scale[[x]]))
  
}

write.csv(data_frequency_all_selected,
          file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, "data_frequency_all_selected.csv"))

write.csv(data_phen_all_selected,
          file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, "data_phen_all_selected.csv"))
```

```{r For_Puplication_comparisons_3_2_Vein_PBMC_v_Vein_WB}

## Publication Comparison 3_2: Individual testing using ggstatplots

## Population Frequency ggstatplots

dir.plots_analysis <- file.path(dir.plots,"Puplication_Comparison_3_2_Vein_PBMC_v_Vein_WB")
dir.create(dir.plots_analysis)

data_frequency_all_selected <- data_frequency_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group == "Vein PBMC" | Group == "Vein WB")

table(data_frequency_all_selected$Donor, data_frequency_all_selected$Group)

data.plot <- data_frequency_all_selected

current_plot_cols_names <- plot_freq_all_cols_names
  
plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
  .l = list(
    data = list(data.plot),
    x = "Group",
    y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
    title = "Blank",
    type = "nonparametric",
    plot.type = "box",
    pairwise.display = "all",
    bf.message = FALSE,
    results.subtitle = FALSE,
    silent = TRUE,
    point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
    centrality.plotting = FALSE,
    centrality.path = FALSE,
    centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
    centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
    boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
    violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
    point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
    ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,100),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("PBMC", "WB")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )

plotlist_with_stats_free_scale <- purrr::pmap(
  .l = list(
    data = list(data.plot),
    x = "Group",
    y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
    title = "Blank",
    type = "nonparametric",
    plot.type = "box",
    pairwise.display = "all",
    bf.message = FALSE,
    results.subtitle = FALSE,
    silent = TRUE,
    point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
    centrality.plotting = FALSE,
    centrality.path = FALSE,
    centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
    centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
    boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
    violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
    point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
    ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,NA),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("PBMC", "WB")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )

names(plotlist_with_stats) <- current_plot_cols_names
names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale) <- current_plot_cols_names

dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep="")))
dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"))

lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats),
       function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(x, "_with_stats_scaled.pdf", sep=""),
                         path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"),
                         height = 1.4,
                         width = 1,

       function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(x, "_with_stats_free_scale.pdf", sep=""),
                         path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"),
                         height = 1.4,
                         width = 1,
                         plot = plotlist_with_stats_free_scale[[x]]))


## Phenotyping Frequency ggstatplots

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group == "Vein PBMC" | Group == "Vein WB")

table(data_phen_all_selected$Donor, data_phen_all_selected$Group)

plot_cols_names <- c(plot_phen_cols_names, "Count")

for (i in unique(data_phen_all_selected$Population)){
  print(i)
  
  data.plot <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
    filter(Population == i)
  
  current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sum_rm_na) == 0]] #removes columns where the selected samples have no values for a parameter
  
    current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sd) == 0]] #removes columns where there is no differences, fucks up ggstatplot otherwise
  

  
  plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,100),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("PBMC", "WB")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
   plotlist_with_stats_free_scale <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,NA),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("PBMC", "WB")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
  # names(plotlist) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale) <- current_plot_cols_names
  
  # stat_list <- lapply(plotlist_with_stats, extract_stats)
  
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep="")))
  # dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"stat_tables"))
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"plots"))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats[[x]]))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_free_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats_free_scale[[x]]))
  
}

write.csv(data_frequency_all_selected,
          file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, "data_frequency_all_selected.csv"))

write.csv(data_phen_all_selected,
          file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, "data_phen_all_selected.csv"))

```

```{r For_Puplication_comparisons_3_2_Tasso_WB_v_Tasso_WB_Shipped}

## Publication Comparison 3_2: Individual testing using ggstatplots

## Population Frequency ggstatplots

dir.plots_analysis <- file.path(dir.plots,"Puplication_Comparison_3_2_Tasso_WB_v_Tasso_WB_Shipped")
dir.create(dir.plots_analysis)

data_frequency_all_selected <- data_frequency_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group == "Tasso WB" | Group == "Tasso WB Shipped")

table(data_frequency_all_selected$Donor, data_frequency_all_selected$Group)

data.plot <- data_frequency_all_selected

current_plot_cols_names <- plot_freq_all_cols_names
  
plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
  .l = list(
    data = list(data.plot),
    x = "Group",
    y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
    title = "Blank",
    type = "nonparametric",
    plot.type = "box",
    pairwise.display = "all",
    bf.message = FALSE,
    results.subtitle = FALSE,
    silent = TRUE,
    point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
    centrality.plotting = FALSE,
    centrality.path = FALSE,
    centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
    centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
    boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
    violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
    point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
    ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,100),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("FH", "Home")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )

plotlist_with_stats_free_scale <- purrr::pmap(
  .l = list(
    data = list(data.plot),
    x = "Group",
    y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
    title = "Blank",
    type = "nonparametric",
    plot.type = "box",
    pairwise.display = "all",
    bf.message = FALSE,
    results.subtitle = FALSE,
    silent = TRUE,
    point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
    centrality.plotting = FALSE,
    centrality.path = FALSE,
    centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
    centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
    boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
    violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
    point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
    ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,NA),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("FH", "Home")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )

names(plotlist_with_stats) <- current_plot_cols_names
names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale) <- current_plot_cols_names

plotlist_with_stats$T_cells_Total_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils <- plotlist_with_stats$T_cells_Total_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100), breaks = seq(0, 100, 25))

plotlist_with_stats$`Monocytes&Macrophages_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils` <- plotlist_with_stats$`Monocytes&Macrophages_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils` + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 50), breaks = seq(0, 50, 10))

plotlist_with_stats$B_cells_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils <- plotlist_with_stats$B_cells_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 50), breaks = seq(0, 50, 10))
plotlist_with_stats$NK_cell_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils <- plotlist_with_stats$NK_cell_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 50), breaks = seq(0, 50, 10))

plotlist_with_stats$cDCs_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils <- plotlist_with_stats$cDCs_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5), breaks = seq(0, 5, 1))
plotlist_with_stats$pDCs_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils <- plotlist_with_stats$pDCs_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5), breaks = seq(0, 5, 1))
plotlist_with_stats$Basophils_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils <- plotlist_with_stats$Basophils_Total_Percent_of_CD45_Positive_Non_Neutrophils + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5), breaks = seq(0, 5, 1))

plotlist_with_stats$NK_cell_CD56bright_Percent_of_NK_cell_Total <- plotlist_with_stats$NK_cell_CD56bright_Percent_of_NK_cell_Total + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), breaks = seq(0, 20, 5))

plotlist_with_stats$cDCs_cDC1s_Percent_of_cDCs_Total <- plotlist_with_stats$cDCs_cDC1s_Percent_of_cDCs_Total + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 10), breaks = seq(0, 10, 2))

plotlist_with_stats$`Monocytes&Macrophages_Intermediate_Percent_of_Monocytes&Macrophages_Total` <- plotlist_with_stats$`Monocytes&Macrophages_Intermediate_Percent_of_Monocytes&Macrophages_Total` + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 25), breaks = seq(0, 25, 5))

plotlist_with_stats$`Monocytes&Macrophages_Nonclassical_Percent_of_Monocytes&Macrophages_Total` <- plotlist_with_stats$`Monocytes&Macrophages_Nonclassical_Percent_of_Monocytes&Macrophages_Total` + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 25), breaks = seq(0, 25, 5))


dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep="")))
dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"))

lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats),
       function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(x, "_with_stats_scaled.pdf", sep=""),
                         path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"),
                         height = 1.4,
                         width = 1,
                         plot = plotlist_with_stats[[x]]))

lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale),
       function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(x, "_with_stats_free_scale.pdf", sep=""),
                         path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"),
                         height = 1.4,
                         width = 1,
                         plot = plotlist_with_stats_free_scale[[x]]))


## Phenotyping Frequency ggstatplots

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group == "Tasso WB" | Group == "Tasso WB Shipped")

table(data_phen_all_selected$Donor, data_phen_all_selected$Group)

plot_cols_names <- c(plot_phen_cols_names, "Count")

for (i in unique(data_phen_all_selected$Population)){
  print(i)
  
  data.plot <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
    filter(Population == i)
  
  current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sum_rm_na) == 0]] #removes columns where the selected samples have no values for a parameter
  
    current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sd) == 0]] #removes columns where there is no differences, fucks up ggstatplot otherwise
  

  
  plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
        geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
        donor_colors,
        ylim(0,100),
        theme(
          plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
          ),
        scale_x_discrete(labels= c("FH", "Home")),
        ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
   plotlist_with_stats_free_scale <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
        geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
        donor_colors,
        ylim(0,NA),
        theme(
          plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
          ),
        scale_x_discrete(labels= c("FH", "Home")),
        ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
  # names(plotlist) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale) <- current_plot_cols_names
  
  if(i %in%  c("Monocytes and Macrophages Total", "B cells Total", "NK cells Total")) {
    plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 10000), breaks = seq(0, 10000, 2000)) + geom_hline(yintercept = 20, linetype="dashed", color = "red", size = 0.25)
  } else if(i %in% c("pDCs Total", "cDCs Total")){
    plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 300), breaks = seq(0, 300, 50)) + geom_hline(yintercept = 20, linetype="dashed", color = "red", size = 0.25)
  } else if(i == "T cells Total"){
    plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 60000), breaks = seq(0, 60000, 10000)) + geom_hline(yintercept = 20, linetype="dashed", color = "red", size = 0.25)
  } else if(i == "Basophils Total"){
    plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1200), breaks = seq(0, 1200, 200)) + geom_hline(yintercept = 20, linetype="dashed", color = "red", size = 0.25)
  } else {
    plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count + geom_hline(yintercept = 20, linetype="dashed", color = "red", size = 0.25)
  }
  
  
  # stat_list <- lapply(plotlist_with_stats, extract_stats)
  
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep="")))
  # dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"stat_tables"))
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"plots"))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats[[x]]))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_free_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats_free_scale[[x]]))
  
}

write.csv(data_frequency_all_selected,
          file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, "data_frequency_all_selected.csv"))

write.csv(data_phen_all_selected,
          file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, "data_phen_all_selected.csv"))

```

```{r For_Publication_comparisons_4_2_F_Tasso_WB_v_Tasso_WB_Shipped}

## Comparison 4_2_F: Individual testing using ggstatplots with cell filter applied to phenotyping outputs

## Phenotyping Frequency ggstatplots

dir.plots_analysis <- file.path(dir.plots,"Publication_Comparison_4_2_F_Tasso_WB_v_Tasso_WB_Shipped")
dir.create(dir.plots_analysis)

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%  filter(Donor %in% filtered_tasso_id) %>%
  filter(Group == "Tasso WB" | Group == "Tasso WB Shipped")

### Filter out low cell count sets

sets_to_remove <- unique(data_phen_all_selected[data_phen_all_selected$Filter == TRUE,]$Donor_Population_Date)

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
  filter(Donor_Population_Date %notin% sets_to_remove)

### Filter out low cell count sets

table(data_phen_all_selected$Donor, data_phen_all_selected$Group)
table(data_phen_all_selected$Population, data_phen_all_selected$Group)

plot_cols_names <- c(plot_phen_cols_names, "Count")

for (i in unique(data_phen_all_selected$Population)){
  print(i)
  
  data.plot <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
    filter(Population == i)
  
  current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sum_rm_na) == 0]] #removes columns where the selected samples have no values for a parameter
  
    current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sd) == 0]] #removes columns where there is no differences, fucks up ggstatplot otherwise
  

  
  plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
        geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
        donor_colors,
        ylim(0,100),
        theme(
          plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
          ),
        scale_x_discrete(labels= c("FH", "Home")),
        ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
   plotlist_with_stats_free_scale <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
        geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
        donor_colors,
        ylim(0,NA),
        theme(
          plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
          ),
        scale_x_discrete(labels= c("FH", "Home")),
        ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
  # names(plotlist) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale) <- current_plot_cols_names
  
  # stat_list <- lapply(plotlist_with_stats, extract_stats)
  
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep="")))
  # dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"stat_tables"))
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"plots"))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats[[x]]))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_free_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats_free_scale[[x]]))
  
}

write.csv(data_phen_all_selected,
          file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, "data_phen_all_selected.csv"))

```

```{r For_Puplication_comparisons_3_2_Tasso_WB_v_Tasso_WB_Shipped_V2}

## Publication Comparison 3_2: Individual testing using ggstatplots

## Population Frequency ggstatplots

dir.plots_analysis <- file.path(dir.plots,"Puplication_Comparison_3_2_Tasso_WB_v_Tasso_WB_Shipped_V2")
dir.create(dir.plots_analysis)

data_frequency_all_selected <- data_frequency_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group %in% c("Tasso WB", "Tasso WB Shipped"))

table(data_frequency_all_selected$Donor, data_frequency_all_selected$Group)

data.plot <- data_frequency_all_selected

current_plot_cols_names <- plot_freq_all_cols_names
  
plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
  .l = list(
    data = list(data.plot),
    x = "Group",
    y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
    title = "Blank",
    type = "nonparametric",
    plot.type = "box",
    pairwise.display = "all",
    bf.message = FALSE,
    results.subtitle = FALSE,
    silent = TRUE,
    point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
    centrality.plotting = FALSE,
    centrality.path = FALSE,
    centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
    centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
    boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
    violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
    point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
    ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,100),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("V", "T", "TS")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )

plotlist_with_stats_free_scale <- purrr::pmap(
  .l = list(
    data = list(data.plot),
    x = "Group",
    y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
    title = "Blank",
    type = "nonparametric",
    plot.type = "box",
    pairwise.display = "all",
    bf.message = FALSE,
    results.subtitle = FALSE,
    silent = TRUE,
    point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
    centrality.plotting = FALSE,
    centrality.path = FALSE,
    centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
    centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
    boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
    violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
    point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
    ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,NA),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("FH", "Home")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )

names(plotlist_with_stats) <- current_plot_cols_names
names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale) <- current_plot_cols_names

dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep="")))
dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"))

lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats),
       function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(x, "_with_stats_scaled.pdf", sep=""),
                         path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"),
                         height = 1.4,
                         width = 1,
                         plot = plotlist_with_stats[[x]]))

lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale),
       function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(x, "_with_stats_free_scale.pdf", sep=""),
                         path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"),
                         height = 1.4,
                         width = 1,
                         plot = plotlist_with_stats_free_scale[[x]]))


## Phenotyping Frequency ggstatplots

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group %in% c("Vein WB", "Tasso WB","Tasso WB Shipped"))

table(data_phen_all_selected$Donor, data_phen_all_selected$Group)

plot_cols_names <- c("Count")

data_phen_all_selected$Count <- log10(data_phen_all_selected$Count)

for (i in unique(data_phen_all_selected$Population)){
  print(i)
  
  data.plot <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
    filter(Population == i)
  
  current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sum_rm_na) == 0]] #removes columns where the selected samples have no values for a parameter
  
    current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sd) == 0]] #removes columns where there is no differences, fucks up ggstatplot otherwise
  

  
  plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
        geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
        donor_colors,
        ylim(0,100),
        theme(
          plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
          ),
        scale_x_discrete(labels= c("V", "T", "TS")),
        ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
   plotlist_with_stats_free_scale <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "none",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
        geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
        donor_colors,
        ylim(0,NA),
        theme(
          plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
          ),
        scale_x_discrete(labels= c("V", "T", "TS")),
        ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
  # names(plotlist) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale) <- current_plot_cols_names
  
  if(i %in%  c("Monocytes and Macrophages Total", "B cells Total", "NK cells Total")) {
    plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5), breaks = seq(0, 5, 1)) + geom_hline(yintercept = log10(20), linetype="dashed", color = "red", size = 0.25)
  } else if(i %in% c("pDCs Total", "cDCs Total")){
    plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5), breaks = seq(0, 5, 1)) + geom_hline(yintercept = log10(20), linetype="dashed", color = "red", size = 0.25)
  } else if(i == "T cells Total"){
    plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5), breaks = seq(0, 5, 1)) + geom_hline(yintercept = log10(20), linetype="dashed", color = "red", size = 0.25)
  } else if(i == "Basophils Total"){
    plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5), breaks = seq(0, 5, 1)) + geom_hline(yintercept = log10(20), linetype="dashed", color = "red", size = 0.25)
  } else {
    plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5), breaks = seq(0, 5, 1)) + geom_hline(yintercept = log10(20), linetype="dashed", color = "red", size = 0.25)
  }
  
  
  # stat_list <- lapply(plotlist_with_stats, extract_stats)
  
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep="")))
  # dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"stat_tables"))
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"plots"))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats[[x]]))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_free_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats_free_scale[[x]]))
  
}

write.csv(data_frequency_all_selected,
          file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, "data_frequency_all_selected.csv"))

write.csv(data_phen_all_selected,
          file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, "data_phen_all_selected.csv"))

```

```{r For_Publication_comparisons_4_2_F_Vein_PBMC_v_Vein_WB_Shipped}

## Comparison 4_2_F: Individual testing using ggstatplots with cell filter applied to phenotyping outputs

## Phenotyping Frequency ggstatplots

dir.plots_analysis <- file.path(dir.plots,"Publication_Comparison_4_2_F_Vein_PBMC_v_Vein_WB")
dir.create(dir.plots_analysis)

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%  
  filter(Donor %in% filtered_tasso_id) %>%
  filter(Group == "Vein PBMC" | Group == "Vein WB")

### Filter out low cell count sets

sets_to_remove <- unique(data_phen_all_selected[data_phen_all_selected$Filter == TRUE,]$Donor_Population_Date)

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
  filter(Donor_Population_Date %notin% sets_to_remove)

### Filter out low cell count sets

table(data_phen_all_selected$Donor, data_phen_all_selected$Group)
table(data_phen_all_selected$Population, data_phen_all_selected$Group)

plot_cols_names <- c(plot_phen_cols_names, "Count")

for (i in unique(data_phen_all_selected$Population)){
  print(i)
  
  data.plot <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
    filter(Population == i)
  
  current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sum_rm_na) == 0]] #removes columns where the selected samples have no values for a parameter
  
    current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sd) == 0]] #removes columns where there is no differences, fucks up ggstatplot otherwise
  

  
  plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
        geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
        donor_colors,
        ylim(0,100),
        theme(
          plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
          ),
        scale_x_discrete(labels= c("PBMC", "WB")),
        ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
   plotlist_with_stats_free_scale <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
        geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
        donor_colors,
        ylim(0,NA),
        theme(
          plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
          ),
        scale_x_discrete(labels= c("PBMC", "WB")),
        ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
  # names(plotlist) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale) <- current_plot_cols_names
  
  # stat_list <- lapply(plotlist_with_stats, extract_stats)
  
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep="")))
  # dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"stat_tables"))
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"plots"))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats[[x]]))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_free_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats_free_scale[[x]]))
  
}

write.csv(data_phen_all_selected,
          file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, "data_phen_all_selected.csv"))
```
