```{r For_Puplication_comparisons_3_2_Tasso_WB_v_Tasso_WB_Shipped_V2_V3}

## Publication Comparison 3_2: Individual testing using ggstatplots

## Population Frequency ggstatplots

dir.plots_analysis <- file.path(dir.plots,"Puplication_Comparison_3_2_Tasso_WB_v_Tasso_WB_Shipped_V2_V3")
dir.create(dir.plots_analysis)


## Phenotyping Frequency ggstatplots

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre")

table(data_phen_all_selected$Donor, data_phen_all_selected$Group)

plot_cols_names <- c("Count")

count_table <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
  select(Donor, Group, Population, Count) %>%
  group_by(Group, Population)

count_summary_stats <- count_table %>%
  summarize(
    mean_value = mean(Count),
    sd_value = sd(Count),
    n_observations = n(), # Count observations in each group
    median_value = median(Count),
    min_value = min(Count),
    max_value = max(Count),
    q1_value = quantile(Count, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3_value = quantile(Count, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = calculate_iqr(Count)
    )

count_summary_stats

write_csv(count_summary_stats,
          file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis,"count_summary_stats.csv"))


data_phen_all_selected$Count <- log10(data_phen_all_selected$Count)

for (i in unique(data_phen_all_selected$Population)){
  print(i)
  
  data.plot <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
    filter(Population == i)
  
  current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sum_rm_na) == 0]] #removes columns where the selected samples have no values for a parameter
  
    current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sd) == 0]] #removes columns where there is no differences, fucks up ggstatplot otherwise
  

  
  plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
        geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
        donor_colors,
        ylim(0,100),
        theme(
          plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
          ),
        scale_x_discrete(labels= c("PB", "V", "T", "TS")),
        ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
   plotlist_with_stats_free_scale <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "none",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
        geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
        donor_colors,
        ylim(0,NA),
        theme(
          plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
          ),
        scale_x_discrete(labels= c("PB", "V", "T", "TS")),
        ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
  # names(plotlist) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale) <- current_plot_cols_names
  
  if(i %in%  c("Monocytes and Macrophages Total", "B cells Total", "NK cells Total")) {
    plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 6), breaks = seq(0, 6, 1)) + geom_hline(yintercept = log10(20), linetype="dashed", color = "red", size = 0.25)
  } else if(i %in% c("pDCs Total", "cDCs Total")){
    plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 6), breaks = seq(0, 6, 1)) + geom_hline(yintercept = log10(20), linetype="dashed", color = "red", size = 0.25)
  } else if(i == "T cells Total"){
    plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 6), breaks = seq(0, 6, 1)) + geom_hline(yintercept = log10(20), linetype="dashed", color = "red", size = 0.25)
  } else if(i == "Basophils Total"){
    plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 6), breaks = seq(0, 6, 1)) + geom_hline(yintercept = log10(20), linetype="dashed", color = "red", size = 0.25)
  } else {
    plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Count + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 6), breaks = seq(0, 6, 1)) + geom_hline(yintercept = log10(20), linetype="dashed", color = "red", size = 0.25)
  }
  
  
  # stat_list <- lapply(plotlist_with_stats, extract_stats)
  
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep="")))
  # dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"stat_tables"))
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"plots"))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats[[x]]))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_free_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats_free_scale[[x]]))
  
}

write.csv(data_phen_all_selected,
          file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, "data_phen_all_selected.csv"))

```


```{r For_Puplication_comparisons_3_2_F_Vein_PBMC_v_Vein_WB}

## Publication Comparison 3_2_F: Individual testing using ggstatplots

dir.plots_analysis <- file.path(dir.plots,"Puplication_Comparison_3_2_F_Vein_PBMC_v_Vein_WB")
dir.create(dir.plots_analysis)

## Phenotyping Frequency ggstatplots

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group == "Vein PBMC" | Group == "Vein WB")

### Filter out low cell count sets

sets_to_remove <- unique(data_phen_all_selected[data_phen_all_selected$Filter == TRUE,]$Donor_Population_Date)

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
  filter(Donor_Population_Date %notin% sets_to_remove)

### Filter out low cell count sets

table(data_phen_all_selected$Donor, data_phen_all_selected$Group)

plot_cols_names <- c(plot_phen_cols_names, "Count")

for (i in unique(data_phen_all_selected$Population)){
  print(i)
  
  data.plot <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
    filter(Population == i)
  
  current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sum_rm_na) == 0]] #removes columns where the selected samples have no values for a parameter
  
    current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sd) == 0]] #removes columns where there is no differences, fucks up ggstatplot otherwise
  

  
  plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,100),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("PBMC", "WB")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
   plotlist_with_stats_free_scale <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,NA),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("PBMC", "WB")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
  # names(plotlist) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale) <- current_plot_cols_names
  
  # stat_list <- lapply(plotlist_with_stats, extract_stats)
  
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep="")))
  # dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"stat_tables"))
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"plots"))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats[[x]]))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_free_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats_free_scale[[x]]))
  
}

write.csv(data_phen_all_selected,
          file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, "data_phen_all_selected.csv"))

```

```{r For_Puplication_comparisons_5_1_Freq_Vein_WB_v_Tasso_WB_ICC_and_Tasso_WB_v_Tasso_WB_Shipped}

## Publication Comparison 5_1: ICC for Frequencies Vein WB v Tasso WB ICC and Tasso WB v Tasso WB Shipped

library("irr")

dir.plots_analysis <- file.path(dir.plots,"Puplication_Comparison_5_1_Vein_WB_v_Tasso_WB_ICC")
dir.create(dir.plots_analysis)

comparison_groups <- list(c("Vein WB", "Tasso WB"), c("Tasso WB", "Tasso WB Shipped"))

plot_freq_major_cols_names

for (a in comparison_groups) {
  data_frequency_all_selected <- data_frequency_all %>%
    filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
    filter(Group %in% a)
  
  icc_aggregate <- data.frame("comparison" = NA,
                              "parameter" = NA, 
                              "subjects" = NA, 
                              "raters" = NA, 
                              "model" = NA,    
                              "type" = NA,   
                              "unit" = NA,   
                              "icc.name" = NA,
                              "value" = NA,
                              "r0" = NA,
                              "Fvalue" = NA,
                              "df1" = NA,
                              "df2" = NA,
                              "p.value" = NA,
                              "conf.level" = NA,
                              "lbound" = NA,
                              "ubound" = NA)
  icc_aggregate
  
  for(i in plot_freq_major_cols_names){
    
    data_frequency_all_selected_iterate <- data_frequency_all_selected %>%
      select("Donor", "Group", {{i}}) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = Group, values_from = {{i}})
    
    icc_value <- icc(ratings = data_frequency_all_selected_iterate %>% select(-"Donor"),
                   model = "twoway",
                   type = "agreement",
                   unit = "single",
                   conf.level = 0.95)
    
    parameter_icc <- data.frame("comparison" = paste( a[1], "vs", a[2]),
                                "parameter" = i, 
                                "subjects" = icc_value$subjects,   
                                "raters" = icc_value$raters,     
                                "model" = icc_value$model, 
                                "type" = icc_value$type,       
                                "unit" = icc_value$unit,  
                                "icc.name" = icc_value$icc.name,
                                "value" = icc_value$value,
                                "r0" = icc_value$r0,
                                "Fvalue" = icc_value$Fvalue,
                                "df1" = icc_value$df1,
                                "df2" = icc_value$df2,
                                "p.value" = icc_value$p.value,
                                "conf.level" = icc_value$conf.level,
                                "lbound" = icc_value$lbound,
                                "ubound" = icc_value$ubound)
    
    icc_aggregate <- icc_aggregate %>%
      bind_rows(parameter_icc)
    
    }
  
  icc_aggregate <- icc_aggregate[-1,]
  
  write.csv(icc_aggregate,
            file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("icc", a[1], "vs", a[2], ".csv", sep =" ")))
}


```

```{r For_Puplication_comparisons_5_2_Phen_Vein_WB_v_Tasso_WB_ICC}

## Publication Comparison 5_2: ICC for Phen Vein WB v Tasso WB

dir.plots_analysis <- file.path(dir.plots,"Puplication_Comparison_5_2_phenotypes_ICC_for_Phen_Vein_WB_v_Tasso_WB")
dir.create(dir.plots_analysis)


data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group == "Vein WB" | Group == "Tasso WB")

# data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all %>%
#   filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
#   filter(Group == "Vein WB" | Group == "Tasso WB") %>%
#   filter(Donor %in% filtered_tasso_id)

### Filter out low cell count sets

sets_to_remove <- unique(data_phen_all_selected[data_phen_all_selected$Filter == TRUE,]$Donor_Population_Date)

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
  filter(Donor_Population_Date %notin% sets_to_remove)

### Filter out low cell count sets

table(data_phen_all_selected$Donor, data_phen_all_selected$Group)
table(data_phen_all_selected$Population, data_phen_all_selected$Group)

plot_cols_names <- c(plot_phen_cols_names, "Count")

for (p in unique(data_phen_all_selected$Population)){
  print(p)
  
  data_phen_all_selected_pop <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
    filter(Population == {{p}})
  
  icc_aggregate <- data.frame("population" = NA,
                              "comparison" = NA,
                              "parameter" = NA, 
                              "subjects" = NA, 
                              "raters" = NA, 
                              "model" = NA,    
                              "type" = NA,   
                              "unit" = NA,   
                              "icc.name" = NA,
                              "value" = NA,
                              "r0" = NA,
                              "Fvalue" = NA,
                              "df1" = NA,
                              "df2" = NA,
                              "p.value" = NA,
                              "conf.level" = NA,
                              "lbound" = NA,
                              "ubound" = NA)
  icc_aggregate
  
  
  for(i in plot_cols_names){
    
    data_phen_all_selected_pop_iterate <- data_phen_all_selected_pop %>%
      select("Donor", "Group", {{i}}) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = Group, values_from = {{i}})
    
    icc_value <- icc(ratings = data_phen_all_selected_pop_iterate %>% select(-"Donor"),
                   model = "twoway",
                   type = "agreement",
                   unit = "single",
                   conf.level = 0.95)
    
    parameter_icc <- data.frame("population" = NA,
                                "comparison" = "Vein WB v Tasso WB",
                                "parameter" = i, 
                                "subjects" = icc_value$subjects,   
                                "raters" = icc_value$raters,     
                                "model" = icc_value$model, 
                                "type" = icc_value$type,       
                                "unit" = icc_value$unit,  
                                "icc.name" = icc_value$icc.name,
                                "value" = icc_value$value,
                                "r0" = icc_value$r0,
                                "Fvalue" = icc_value$Fvalue,
                                "df1" = icc_value$df1,
                                "df2" = icc_value$df2,
                                "p.value" = icc_value$p.value,
                                "conf.level" = icc_value$conf.level,
                                "lbound" = icc_value$lbound,
                                "ubound" = icc_value$ubound)
    
    icc_aggregate <- icc_aggregate %>%
      bind_rows(parameter_icc)
    
    }
  
  icc_aggregate <- icc_aggregate[-1,]
  
  write.csv(icc_aggregate,
            file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("icc", p, ".csv", sep =" ")))
}

```

```{r For_Puplication_comparisons_5_3_Phen_Tasso_WB_v_Tasso_WB_Shipped_ICC}

## Publication Comparison 5_3: ICC for Phen Tasso WB v Tasso WB Shipped

dir.plots_analysis <- file.path(dir.plots,"Puplication_Comparison_5_3_phenotypes_ICC_for_Tasso_WB_v_Tasso_WB_Shipped")
dir.create(dir.plots_analysis)


data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group == "Tasso WB" | Group == "Tasso WB Shipped") %>%
  filter(Donor %in% filtered_tasso_id)

### Filter out low cell count sets

sets_to_remove <- unique(data_phen_all_selected[data_phen_all_selected$Filter == TRUE,]$Donor_Population_Date)

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
  filter(Donor_Population_Date %notin% sets_to_remove)

### Filter out low cell count sets

table(data_phen_all_selected$Donor, data_phen_all_selected$Group)
table(data_phen_all_selected$Population, data_phen_all_selected$Group)

plot_cols_names <- c(plot_phen_cols_names, "Count")

for (p in unique(data_phen_all_selected$Population)){
  print(p)
  
  data_phen_all_selected_pop <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
    filter(Population == {{p}})
  
  icc_aggregate <- data.frame("population" = NA,
                              "comparison" = NA,
                              "parameter" = NA, 
                              "subjects" = NA, 
                              "raters" = NA, 
                              "model" = NA,    
                              "type" = NA,   
                              "unit" = NA,   
                              "icc.name" = NA,
                              "value" = NA,
                              "r0" = NA,
                              "Fvalue" = NA,
                              "df1" = NA,
                              "df2" = NA,
                              "p.value" = NA,
                              "conf.level" = NA,
                              "lbound" = NA,
                              "ubound" = NA)
  icc_aggregate
  
  
  for(i in plot_phen_cols_names){
    
    data_phen_all_selected_pop_iterate <- data_phen_all_selected_pop %>%
      select("Donor", "Group", {{i}}) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = Group, values_from = {{i}})
    
    icc_value <- icc(ratings = data_phen_all_selected_pop_iterate %>% select(-"Donor"),
                   model = "twoway",
                   type = "agreement",
                   unit = "single",
                   conf.level = 0.95)
    
    parameter_icc <- data.frame("population" = NA,
                                "comparison" = "Tasso WB v Tasso WB Shipped",
                                "parameter" = i, 
                                "subjects" = icc_value$subjects,   
                                "raters" = icc_value$raters,     
                                "model" = icc_value$model, 
                                "type" = icc_value$type,       
                                "unit" = icc_value$unit,  
                                "icc.name" = icc_value$icc.name,
                                "value" = icc_value$value,
                                "r0" = icc_value$r0,
                                "Fvalue" = icc_value$Fvalue,
                                "df1" = icc_value$df1,
                                "df2" = icc_value$df2,
                                "p.value" = icc_value$p.value,
                                "conf.level" = icc_value$conf.level,
                                "lbound" = icc_value$lbound,
                                "ubound" = icc_value$ubound)
    
    icc_aggregate <- icc_aggregate %>%
      bind_rows(parameter_icc)
    
    }
  
  icc_aggregate <- icc_aggregate[-1,]
  
  write.csv(icc_aggregate,
            file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("icc", p, ".csv", sep =" ")))
}

```
